rationale: Refactor of JiraDcManager.validate_request: extracts a new validate_request_context method that returns the matched workspace alongside the existing (valid, signature, payload) tuple. The original validate_request becomes a thin wrapper that discards the workspace for backward compatibility. Also adds an Alembic migration to add org_id to jira_dc_workspaces. The mock-of-hallucination detector fired likely on one of the local imports (storage.jira_dc_workspace, openhands.app_server.integrations.service_types) the detector couldn't resolve against the Python manifest. Legitimate refactor with downstream consumer support.
